title: Synapse Staining in Mouse Brain Sections
author: Shiyi Wang

steps.title: Wash the brain sections in 1x TBS containing 0
steps.instruction: Wash the brain sections in 1x TBS containing 0.2% Triton X-100 (TBST). Use 40 μm free-floating mouse brain sections containing the visual cortex.

steps.title: Block non-specific binding by incubating sections...
steps.instruction: Block non-specific binding by incubating sections in 10% normal goat serum (NGS) diluted in TBST for 01:00:00 at Room temperature .

steps.title: Mount sections onto glass slides using Mowiol
steps.instruction: Mount sections onto glass slides using Mowiol.

steps.title: Incubate sections in Alexa Fluor 488...
steps.instruction: Incubate sections in Alexa Fluor 488 goat anti-rabbit IgG(H+L) and Alexa Fluor 647 goat anti-guineapig IgG(H+L) secondary antibodies, diluted 1:100 in TBST, for 03:00:00 at Room temperature in the dark.

steps.title: Incubate sections with rabbit anti-PSD95 (1:300)...
steps.instruction: Incubate sections with rabbit anti-PSD95 (1:300) and guineapig anti-Bassoon (1:500) primary antibodies diluted in blocking buffer (10% NGS in TBST) for 2 nights at 4 °C with gentle shaking.

steps.title: Wash sections with TBST (3x 10 min)
steps.instruction: Wash sections with TBST (3x 10 min). For nuclear staining, add DAPI (1:5000) to the second wash.

steps.title: Allow slides to cure overnight at...
steps.instruction: Allow slides to cure overnight at Room temperature in the dark.

steps.title: Acquire high-magnification z-stack images using a fluorescent microscope (e
steps.instruction: Acquire high-magnification z-stack images using a fluorescent microscope (e.g. Zeiss LSM 880): Use a 63× objective plus 1.6× optical zoom. Capture 3 optical sections spaced 0.34 μm apart per z-stack. Ensure consistent imaging settings for all conditions. Image within 2 days for optimal results.

steps.title: Identify excitatory synapses by the colocalization...
steps.instruction: Identify excitatory synapses by the colocalization of pre-synaptic (Bassoon) and post-synaptic (PSD95) puncta.

steps.title: Quantify the number of co-localized synaptic...
steps.instruction: Quantify the number of co-localized synaptic puncta using SynBot, an ImageJ-based software ( https://github.com/Eroglu-Lab/Syn_Bot ).
